$comment: Tool declarations for dotnet - the offloaded config.tools[]. Each runs tools/<name>.ps1; the entry carries the command, inputSchema (for MCP), stdin mapping, and timeout. The old config.tools[] flow-kind and kb_answer entries are dropped (the new model uses /flow + chains).

tools.name: csc_check
tools.description: Compile a C# file with the in-box csc at langversion 5 and report OK or the compiler diagnostics. The C# source is supplied on stdin.

tools.name: ps_parse
tools.description: Parse-check a PowerShell script (syntax only, no execution) and report OK or the parse errors. The script is supplied on stdin.

tools.name: build_csharp
tools.description: Compile a workspace C# source file to a PERSISTENT .exe next to it (auto-detects WinForms -> winexe). Arg: src.

src.description: path to a .cs file under the instance

tools.name: csc_winforms
tools.description: Compile a complete WinForms C# program as a winexe (WinForms + Drawing refs) at langversion 5 and report OK or diagnostics. Source on stdin.

code.description: a complete WinForms C# program with a [STAThread] Main

tools.name: build_project
tools.description: Build a whole project via its response.rsp (csc -noconfig @response.rsp) to a persistent exe. Arg: proj.

tools.name: read_project
tools.description: Show a project's state and grounding context: PROJECT.md, project.json, the src tree, manifest drift, an adapter template. Arg: proj.

tools.name: stage_and_build
tools.description: Write a candidate C# file into a project's src tree and build the WHOLE project; report OK or diagnostics. Code on stdin.

tools.name: register_file
tools.description: Record a newly added file in a project's on-disk memory (project.json.files + a PROJECT.md changelog line). Idempotent.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Print one project source file verbatim, to ground a surgical edit on the file's exact current contents.

tools.name: log_edit
tools.description: Append an 'edited' line to a project's PROJECT.md changelog (records an edit in the on-disk memory).

tools.name: new_project
tools.description: Scaffold a structured C# project under workspaces/<name> (src/Core + src/Drivers, response.rsp, build.ps1, project.json, PROJECT.md). Arg: spec = "<name> [console|winforms]". Then /ws switch <name>.

spec.description: project name, optionally followed by console|winforms

tools.name: make_launcher
tools.description: Write a SAC-safe launcher .cmd into a workspace that runs its built exe via the in-memory loader (run_app.ps1). The operator runs the .cmd from their own session to launch the app. Arg: proj = workspace path.
